app.title: Cyberpunk Personality Lab
app.subtitle: SBTI Lab
app.introDesc:
30 soul-searching questions, 15-dimension deep scan, 27 personality types precisely matched.
Ready to face the real you?
app.introNote: Runs locally · No data upload · ~3-5 min

q1.text: I'm not just a loser, I'm a joker, I'm a salted fish. Never been in a relationship, timid and insecure. My youth was nothing but fantasy after fantasy...

q2.text: I'm not good enough, everyone around me is better.

q3.text: I know clearly who I really am.

q4.text: I have something I truly pursue deep inside.

q5.text: I must keep climbing and becoming stronger.

q6.text: Others' opinions don't matter to me at all.

q7.text: Your partner hasn't replied for 5 hours, claiming diarrhea. What do you think?
q7.option1: Diarrhea doesn't take 5 hours. They must be hiding something.
q7.option3: Maybe they're really not feeling well today.

q8.text: I often worry about being abandoned in relationships.

q9.text: I swear, I take every relationship seriously!

q10.text: Your partner is kind, gentle, upright, eloquent, knowledgeable, handsome/beautiful... What do you do?
q10.option1: Even if they're amazing, I won't fall too deep.
q10.option3: I'd cherish them deeply, maybe become love-brained.

q11.text: After dating, your partner becomes very clingy. What do you think?

q12.text: I value personal space in any relationship.

q13.option1: Actually, evil hearts are more common than hemorrhoids in this world.
q13.option3: Yes, I choose to believe good people outnumber the bad.

q14.text: A cute little girl bounces toward you on the street and hands you a lollipop. What's your reaction?
q14.option1: Aww she's so nice and cute! She gave me a lollipop!
q14.option3: This might be a new type of scam. Better walk away.

q15.text: Exams are coming, evening study is mandatory. But you promised your crush to play PUBG tonight. What do you do?
q15.option3: Exams are coming, no way I'm going.

q16.text: I like breaking rules and hate being constrained.

q17.text: I usually have clear goals when doing things.

q18.text: Suddenly I realized: what's the meaning of life? Humans are just animals driven by desires, controlled by hormones...

q19.text: I do things mainly to achieve results and progress, not to avoid trouble and risk.

q20.text: You're constipated on the toilet (30 minutes already). You're more like:
q20.option1: Sit another 30 minutes, maybe something will come out.
q20.option2: Slap your butt and yell: 'Stupid butt, poop already!'
q20.option3: Use a suppository, get it done quickly.

q21.text: I make decisions decisively, I don't like hesitating.

q22.text: This question has no text. Please choose blindly.

q23.text: When someone says you have 'strong execution', which response is closer to your heart?
q23.option1: I'm only super productive when pushed to the last minute...
q23.option3: Yes, things should be pushed forward.

q24.option1: but plans never keep up with changes.
q24.option2: sometimes I complete them, sometimes not.
q24.option3: and I hate it when plans get disrupted.

q25.text: You made many online friends through gaming and got invited to meet offline. Your thoughts?
q25.option1: Online chatting is fine, but meeting in person is nerve-wracking.
q25.option2: Meeting online friends is fine, whoever chats I'll chat back.
q25.option3: I'll dress up and chat enthusiastically. You never know!

q26.text: A friend brings their friend to hang out. Your most likely state is:
q26.option1: Natural distance from 'friend's friend', worried it affects our dynamic.
q26.option2: Depends on the person, if we click we click.
q26.option3: Friend's friend should also be my friend! Gotta chat warmly.

q27.text: I have an electronic fence when socializing — get too close and the alarm goes off.

q28.text: I desire close relationships with people I trust, as familiar as long-lost relatives.

q29.text: Sometimes you disagree with something negatively but end up staying silent. Usually because:
q29.option2: Maybe out of politeness or relationship concerns.
q29.option3: Don't want others to know I have dark thoughts.

q30.text: I show different sides of myself to different people.

CTRL.name: The Controller
CTRL.intro: How about it, got you figured out?
CTRL.desc: Congratulations, you've got the rarest personality in the nation. You are a natural rebel against the law of entropy! CTRL personality is a walking task manager. What others call 'rules' are just factory default settings for you; what mortals call 'plans' are just your casual doodles. Having a CTRL friend means your life navigation becomes more precise and efficient.

ATM-er.name: The Giver
ATM-er.desc: Congratulations, you've got one of the rarest personalities in the world. ATM-er may not literally 'give money', but they're always 'paying' — paying time, energy, patience, paying for a peaceful night that should have been calm.

Dior-s.name: The Loser
Dior-s.desc: Congratulations! You are not a loser, you are the spiritual successor of Diogenes. Dior-s personality is the most thorough contempt for modern consumerism and success-obsessed manipulation. They haven't 'given up', they've already seen through that all 'ambition' leads to is a fancier cage.

BOSS.name: The Leader
BOSS.intro: Give me the wheel, I'll drive.
BOSS.desc: BOSS always has the steering wheel in hand. Even when the fuel light is on and the GPS is nonsense, they'll deadpan: 'I'll drive.' And actually get there. Their world is like a completed game — everyone else is still on the tutorial.

THAN-K.name: The Grateful
THAN-K.intro: I thank the heavens! I thank the earth!
THAN-K.desc: You should thank me! Thank you for having the nourishment of life in this moment! THAN-K has a gentle nature and an all-embracing heart. In their eyes, there are no completely bad people, only 'friends not yet illuminated by the light of gratitude'.

OH-NO.name: The Worrier
OH-NO.intro: Oh no! How did I get this personality?!
OH-NO.desc: 'Oh no!' is not a scream of fear, but top-tier wisdom. When ordinary people see a cup on the table's edge, the Worrier sees an epic disaster from water stain to short circuit to fire to evacuation to economic loss to butterfly effect to apocalypse.

GOGO.name: The Goer
GOGO.desc: GOGO lives in an extreme 'what you see is what you get' world. Their life motto is brutally simple: close my eyes, sky is dark; spend all money, have no money. Perfect logical closure, impossible to refute.

SEXY.name: The Bombshell
SEXY.desc: When you walk into a room, the lighting system automatically recognizes you as a natural beauty and dims itself to save energy. When you smile, the surrounding air humidity drops significantly because water vapor condenses into heart shapes in people's eyes.

LOVE-R.name: The Romantic
LOVE-R.desc: Your emotional processor isn't binary — it's rainbow. A falling leaf isn't just 'autumn is here', it's a thirteen-act tragicomedy about reincarnation, sacrifice, and wordless love. Your inner world is like a theme park that never closes.

MUM.name: The Mom
MUM.intro: Maybe... I could call you mom?
MUM.desc: Mom's base color is gentleness, skilled at sensing emotions, with super empathy. Like a doctor, healing others' unhappiness. Unfortunately, when Mom sheds tears, the medicine they give themselves is always a smaller dose than what they give others.

FAKE.name: The Chameleon
FAKE.desc: In social situations, the Chameleon is the master of all faces, switching personality masks faster than switching phone keyboards. You thought you made a friend who truly gets you? Wake up. You just met a highly adaptable, high-performance android.

OJBK.name: The Whatever
OJBK.intro: When I say whatever, I mean whatever.
OJBK.desc: This isn't lack of opinion — it's a ruling philosophy. When mortals face the epochal choice of 'rice or noodles for lunch', Whatever personality dismissively utters: Either's fine. This isn't being easy — it's telling you: your mundane choices are beneath their notice.

MALO.name: The Monkey
MALO.intro: Life is a dungeon, and I'm just a monkey.
MALO.desc: Your soul is still stuck in the tree-swinging, banana-loving era. When human ancestors decided to come down from trees, walk upright, and wear suits, the Monkey's ancestor watched from a nearby tree, scratched its butt, and let out a dismissive 'squeak'.

JOKE-R.name: The Jester
JOKE-R.desc: JOKE-R isn't a 'person', more like a walking joke. Open one layer, it's a joke; another layer, a gag; keep opening until the very center... it's empty, with only a faint echo: 'Hah, didn't see that coming.'

WOC!.name: The Wower
WOC!.intro: WTF, how did I get this personality?
WOC!.desc: WOC! people have two independent operating systems: one called 'Surface System' that outputs 'WTF!' 'Awesome!' 'Huh?'; another called 'Background System' that calmly analyzes: 'Yep, exactly as I expected.'

THIN-K.name: The Thinker
THIN-K.desc: Your brain is in thinking mode for extended periods. You excel at auditing information, focusing on arguments, evidence, logical reasoning, potential biases, and even 'the author's three-generation ideological background investigation report'.

SHIT.name: The Cynic
SHIT.intro: This world is a pile of crap.
SHIT.desc: SHIT's behavioral pattern is a shocking paradox drama. Mouth: 'This project is shit.' Hands: silently opening Excel, building function models and Gantt charts. Mouth: 'These colleagues are all shit.' Hands: staying up late to clean up their mess.

ZZZZ.name: The Sleeper
ZZZZ.intro: I'm not dead, I'm just sleeping.
ZZZZ.desc: 99+ messages in the group? Ignored. But when '@Everyone: 30 minutes left' appears, you rise from your millennium-old tomb like a mummy, slowly typing 'received', then deliver a barely-passing result in 29 minutes.

POOR.name: The Focused
POOR.desc: This 'poverty' isn't about wallet balance — it's resource reallocation after desire minimalism. You compress energy into a laser beam, wherever it points, it starts smoking. You're not resource-poor, you've poured everything into one pit.

MONK.name: The Monk
MONK.desc: MONK has seen through worldly illusions. Their personal space is sacred ground, their absolute domain. Intruders feel a suffocating pressure from the soul. Planets maintain millions of kilometers between them to form a harmonious universe — why can't people?

IMSB.name: The Conflicted
IMSB.intro: Seriously? Am I really an idiot?
IMSB.desc: Your brain houses two immortal ultimate warriors: one says 'Let's f***ing go!' and the other says 'I'm an idiot!' When facing someone you like, the former says go get their WeChat! The latter says why would they like you? Result: staring at their back until they disappear.

SOLO.name: The Lone Wolf
SOLO.intro: I'm crying, how am I a lone wolf?
SOLO.desc: Don't rush to cry — coronation ceremonies are usually solo. Lone Wolves have low self-worth, so they sometimes actively distance from others, building a Great Wall called 'Don't Touch Me' around their soul. Every brick is a past wound.

FUCK.name: The Rebel
FUCK.desc: In FUCK's worldview, worldly rules are meaningless. Their emotion switch is physical: FUCK YEAH and FUCK OFF. When everyone's been tamed into compliant poultry, FUCK is the last wolf howl in the wilderness.

DEAD.name: The Deceased
DEAD.desc: The Deceased have seen through meaningless philosophical thinking, so they seem to have 'lost' interest in everything. They look at the world like a top player who's completed all main quests, side quests, and hidden tasks, restarted 999 times, and finally realized: this game has no point.

IMFW.name: The Fragile
IMFW.desc: Give a Fragile person a piece of candy, they'll give you a completely trusting, sparkling look. You're not useless — you're just too unguarded, too easily sincere. Your self-esteem is fragile, you lack security, but you can precisely sense the strongest WiFi signal around — the person you trust most.

HHHH.name: The Laughing
HHHH.desc: Congratulations! Your thought circuits are so unconventional that the standard personality database has completely crashed. This personality only appears when the first match rate falls below 60%. What are its traits? Hahahahahahahahaha! Sorry, that's all the traits.

DRUNK.name: The Drunk
DRUNK.intro: Strong liquor burns the throat, must get drunk.
DRUNK.desc: Why do you walk swaying? Why are you always emotionally charged? Why do you see double? Because what flows in your veins isn't blood — it's delicious baijiu! You've grown accustomed to pouring liquor into a thermos and drinking it like water.
